title: Betadrive
description: Betadrive is a mod where you can become an android, granting you the ability to upgrade your health, display a custom HUD, and much more!
body:
**Note:** Betadrive is still heavily in development and there *may* be difficulties migrating to newer versions. Compatibility with newer versions to older versions will be maintained as much as possible, however.

---

Betadrive is a mod where you can become an android, granting you the ability to upgrade your health, display a custom HUD, and much more!

To start, craft a Red Pill and right click it. 

## Recipes:
<details>
<summary>Recipes (show/hide)</summary>
Red Pill:

![A recipe for a Red Pill from Betadrive. From top left to bottom right going right then down: diamond, redstone block, diamond, redstone block, printed circuit board, redstone block, diamond, redstone block, diamond. The result is a Red Pill.](https://i.imgur.com/O11UaHR.png)

Blue Pill:

![A recipe for a Blue Pill from Betadrive. From top left to bottom right going right then down: diamond, lapis block, diamond, lapis block, printed circuit board, lapis block, diamond, lapis block, diamond. The result is a Blue Pill.](https://i.imgur.com/NaQb5R3.png)

Circuit:

![A recipe for a Printed Circuit Board from Betadrive. From top left to bottom right going right then down: any plank, redstone, any plank, redstone, iron ingot, redstone, any plank, redstone, any plank. The result is a Printed Circuit Board.](https://i.imgur.com/Dq0xBGn.png)

Battery:

![A recipe for a Battery from Betadrive. From top left to bottom right going right then down: nothing, lapis lazuli, iron ingot, redstone, iron ingot, iron ingot, redstone, iron ingot. The result is a Battery.](https://i.imgur.com/ZT8uNYQ.png)

Robofist:

![A recipe for a Robofist from Betadrive. From top left to bottom right going right then down: printed circuit board, diamond, nothing, printed circuit board, netherite scrap, netherite scrap, printed circuit board, diamond, nothing.](https://i.imgur.com/gOvtmRh.png)
</details>
